compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Bleak Faith: Forsaken
- Steam AppID of the game: 1173220

## System Information
- GPU: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 SUPER
- Driver/LLVM version: NVIDIA 525.60.11
- Kernel version: 6.2.5-arch1-1
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/lilly-lizard/066bba73f867fa64501bf09b8f1daf3e):
- Proton version: 1677511134 experimental-7.0-20230227

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

[steam-1173220.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/10953141/steam-1173220.log)

## Symptoms

Game runs great in-game but will freeze when opening an in-game menu, e.g. pause menu.

## Reproduction

Start the game through steam. Once in-game, press escape to open the pause menu, game freezes.

## Fix

As seen in the log file, there was just a missing av decoding g-streamer plugin:

```
winegstreamer error: decodebin0: Your GStreamer installation is missing a plug-in.
winegstreamer error: decodebin0: ../src-gst_base/gst/playback/gstdecodebin2.c(4719): gst_decode_bin_expose ()     : /GstBin:bin0/GstDecodeBin:decodebin0:
no suitable plugins found:
Couldn't set avdec_h264-0 to PAUSEDCouldn't set avdec_valve_h264-0 to PAUSED
```

On arch linux I fixed this by installing gst-libav, but ideally an end-user shouldn't have to figure this out and the gst av libs should be a dependency of proton or something.
symptom_summary:

Tags: Game Crash, Black Screen, Language Issue

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Hunt: Showdown 1896
- Steam AppID of the game: 594650

## System Information
- GPU: RTX 3080Ti
- Video driver version: nvidia-open-dkms 555.58.02-15
- Kernel version: 6.10.4-273-tkg-bore
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/): https://gist.github.com/domainzero/afa36a2a105f267631a4664122ec0a29
- Proton version: Proton Experimental
- Proton log: https://gist.github.com/domainzero/d76938065bfcf9f50db2349f456ee850

## I confirm:
- [X] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [X] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

<!-- Please add `PROTON_LOG=1 %command%` to the game's launch options and
attach the generated $HOME/steam-$APPID.log to this issue report as a file.
(Proton logs compress well if needed.)-->

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
Game starts to a black screen and eventually closes as of latest Hunt: Showdown update. The developers did upgrade the game to a new engine version (Cryengine 5.13) which may be the root cause of this.

## Reproduction

1. Start the game.
2. Wait while the game sits at a black screen.
3. The game closes.

<!--

   e.g. for `The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt` the AppID is `292030`.
4. You can find your driver and Linux version, as well as your graphics
   processor's name in the system information report of Steam.
5. You can retrieve a full system information report by clicking
   `Help` > `System Information` in the Steam client on your machine.
6. Please copy it to your clipboard by pressing `Ctrl+A` and then `Ctrl+C`.
   Then paste it in a [Gist](https://gist.github.com/) and post the link in
   this issue.
7. Also, please copy the contents of `Help` > `Steam Runtime Diagnostics` to
   the gist.
8. Please search for open issues and pull requests by the name of the game and
   find out whether they are relevant and should be referenced above.
-->

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: Mirror 2: Project X 
- Steam AppID of the game: 1832640

## System Information
- GPU: GTX 1060 6GB
- Driver/LLVM version: 495.46 proprietary 
- Kernel version: 5.13
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/jolty1/caaf96b24d0e1e6cff4fb8014a2d3c59/):
- Proton version: Experimental

## I confirm:
- [X] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [X] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
The games launcher shows a blank window, You must bypass the launcher.

Run exe in "steamapps/common/Mirror 2 Project X/ProjectX/Mirror2/Binaries/Win64/Mirror2_X-Win64-Shipping.exe"

## Reproduction

Try to launch the game

## Fix

Advice from [Steam Discussion](https://steamcommunity.com/app/1832640/discussions/0/3185734950683022943/#c3185734950685067143)

Set the launch option: 

`eval $( echo "%command%" | sed "s/Launcher\/Mirror2.ProjectX.Launcher.exe'.*/ProjectX\/Mirror2\/Binaries\/Win64\/Mirror2_X-Win64-Shipping.exe'/" )
`

Updated: Home DLC

`eval $( echo "%command%" | sed "s/Launcher\/Mirror2.ProjectX.Launcher.exe'.*/HomeX\/Mirror2_HomeX\/Binaries\/Win64\/Mirror2_HomeX-Win64-Shipping.exe'/" )
`

To change the games language to English click the globe in the top right, and its the last option.

![Screenshot_20220121_132736](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/42779428/150535030-bb19eebf-dca2-4fed-aa61-0399c3f293d6.png)
![Screenshot_20220121_133309](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/42779428/150535757-a0613ab4-f74f-4bdb-9f53-1d053c7664e7.png)

[steam-1832640.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/7913819/steam-1832640.log)

Log is before fix. Running broken launcher.
symptom_summary:
用户在启动《Mirror 2: Project X》时遇到的问题是游戏启动器显示空白窗口，需要绕过启动器才能运行游戏。 

Tags: Blank Window, Launcher Issue, Bypass Required

- Steam AppID of the game: 2225070

- Kernel version: 6.0.12
- Link to full system information report as [Gist](https://gist.github.com/JobeSound/e3a02d39c9bb6ef6cf474589bc71d78c):
- Proton version: 7.0-6, Experimental

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->
After logging into Ubisoft, the game opens a small black window and immediatley shows an error message saying:
"Corrupted Installation.
Please verify files integrity or reinstall the game."

I have done both several times with several Proton and Proton-GE versions, without change.

## Reproduction
Launch fresh install of the game on same or comparable system.

Log:
[steam-2225070.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/10678827/steam-2225070.log)
symptom_summary:
用户在启动《Trackmania》时遇到问题，游戏在登录Ubisoft后打开一个小黑窗口，并立即显示错误信息：“安装损坏。请验证文件完整性或重新安装游戏。”用户尝试了多次验证和重新安装，但问题依然存在。

**Tag Suggestions:** Installation Error, Black Screen, Game Launch Failure

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Steam AppID of the game: 3314070

## System Information
- Proton version: 9.0.4
- Device: Steam Deck 256GB LED

## I confirm:
- [X] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [X] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

The game appears to work fine on Steam Deck, but there is an issue regarding in-game video captures, and I haven’t found any issues from anyone else with this. Simply press V or select the cam recorder icon on the GUI and you should get an “unspecified error” popup. Sometimes you may get an error with Smooth Edges, but changing this value doesn’t seem to fix the issue.

[steam-3314070.log](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/18624592/steam-3314070.log)

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1e54ccd0-e111-4e7c-93c2-e2870b69bd98)
symptom_summary:
用户在Steam Deck上玩游戏时，遇到了游戏内视频捕捉的问题，尝试录制时会弹出“未指定错误”的提示，且调整Smooth Edges设置也无法解决此问题。

Tags: Video Capture Error, Unspecified Error, Settings Issue

compatibility_report:
# Compatibility Report
- Name of the game with compatibility issues: [Atomic Heart](https://store.steampowered.com/app/668580/Atomic_Heart/?snr=1_4_4__118)
- Steam AppID of the game: 668580

## System Information
- GPU: Steam Deck
- Driver/LLVM version: Steam Deck
- Kernel version: Steam Deck
- Proton version: Proton 7.0-6

## I confirm:
- [x] that I haven't found an existing compatibility report for this game.
- [x] that I have checked whether there are updates for my system available.

Log file: [steam-668580.log](https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/files/10795381/steam-668580.log) that goes up to the difficulty selection where the first missing videos are.

## Symptoms <!-- What's the problem? -->

None of the in-game videos work. There should be some on difficulty selection but they're blank.

There should also be videos on various screens on the game, they also don't play but you do hear the audio.

## Reproduction

Just try it with Proton, get to the difficulty screen when starting a new game, and notice the black boxes above the options.

It has also now been given a "Steam Deck Playable" rating, but since videos in-game are broken, it shouldn't even be set as Playable should it?
symptom_summary:
用户在游戏《Atomic Heart》中遇到的问题是游戏内的视频无法播放，尽管音频正常，但视频画面显示为空白。用户在选择难度时注意到黑色框框，表示视频缺失。

Tag suggestions: Missing Videos, Audio Issues, Visual Glitches
